trending: BABYMONSTER 3rd MINI ALBUM [CHOOM] dropping 2026.05.04 — World Tour starting Seoul June 26-28!

articles.title: 2026-27 BABYMONSTER WORLD TOUR [CHOOM] IN SEOUL — Presale D-Day
articles.summary: BABYMONSTER released a new teaser for their upcoming world tour 'CHOOM' in Seoul. The presale for the concert opens today, with MONSTIEZ worldwide rushing to secure tickets for the highly anticipated shows scheduled for June 26-28 in Seoul.

articles.title: BABYMONSTER Launches Seoul Concert Pre-Sale for June Tour
articles.summary: BABYMONSTER has officially initiated pre-sale for their Seoul concert performances scheduled for June 26-28 as part of their second world tour 'CHOOM'. The three-day event marks a major milestone for the group's touring career.

articles.title: Ahyeon — New Solo Content Drop
articles.summary: Ahyeon shared adorable new content on BABYMONSTER's official YouTube channel, delighting fans with her charming personality. The short video quickly gained millions of views from excited MONSTIEZ worldwide.

articles.title: Chiquita — 'Watch This, Watch This'
articles.summary: Chiquita captivated fans with a fresh new short on the group's YouTube channel, showcasing her dynamic energy and charisma. The video highlights her unique style that fans have grown to love.

articles.title: Baby Monster Celebrates 2nd Anniversary With Special News, Tour Preview
articles.summary: BABYMONSTER marked their second anniversary with special announcements including a preview of their upcoming world tour and new content for fans. The group shared heartfelt messages to MONSTIEZ during the celebration.

articles.title: Asa — 'Hi There!'
articles.summary: Asa greeted fans with a cheerful new short video on YouTube, showing off her bright personality. The Japanese member continues to win hearts with her warm and playful content.

articles.title: [BAEMON NEWS 7] THE 1ST BM AWARDS... AND MORE
articles.summary: BABYMONSTER released BAEMON NEWS Episode 7 featuring the first-ever BM Awards and exciting announcements about their 3rd Mini Album 'CHOOM' dropping May 4, 2026. The episode also previews their upcoming second world tour.

articles.title: Ruka, Asa & Rora — Guitar Jam Session
articles.summary: Ruka, Asa and Rora shared a fun guitar jam session moment on BABYMONSTER's YouTube, showing their musical versatility beyond the stage. Fans loved seeing the members' creative chemistry.

articles.title: Ruka & Pharita in Hong Kong
articles.summary: Ruka and Pharita shared highlights from their time in Hong Kong, giving fans a glimpse into their off-stage adventures. The duo's chemistry and travel content charmed MONSTIEZ around the world.

articles.title: BABYMONSTER 2nd Anniversary — Full of Love
articles.summary: BABYMONSTER celebrated their 2nd anniversary with a special video message for MONSTIEZ, expressing their gratitude and love. The heartfelt content touched fans worldwide as the group reflected on their journey.

articles.title: BabyMonster Kicks Off 'Choom' Tour from Seoul in June
articles.summary: BABYMONSTER will launch their second world tour 'CHOOM' from Seoul in June, with South-east Asian and international dates still pending confirmation. The tour follows the release of their 3rd mini album of the same name.

articles.title: BabyMonster to Drop Third EP 'Choom', Host Interactive 'Monstiez Day' Events
articles.summary: BABYMONSTER announced their 3rd mini album 'CHOOM' along with interactive 'Monstiez Day' fan engagement events. The Korea JoongAng Daily reports this marks a new chapter in the group's fan connection strategy.

articles.title: BABYMONSTER 3rd MINI ALBUM [CHOOM] — Teaser
articles.summary: The official teaser for BABYMONSTER's 3rd mini album 'CHOOM' dropped on YouTube, set for release on May 4, 2026 at 6PM KST. Fans are buzzing with excitement as the group prepares for their next musical chapter.

articles.title: BABYMONSTER's 'WE GO UP' MV Tops 200 Million Views
articles.summary: BABYMONSTER's music video for 'WE GO UP' has surpassed 200 million views on YouTube, marking another significant streaming milestone for the group. The achievement cements their position as one of K-pop's fastest-rising acts.

articles.title: BabyMonster's Ruka Tops Poll on Japanese K-pop Artist to Watch in 2026
articles.summary: Ruka has topped the Picnic poll for the most anticipated Japanese K-pop artist to watch in 2026, highlighting her growing individual popularity and influence in the Japanese entertainment market.

articles.title: BabyMonster Surpasses 11 Million YouTube Subscribers — Fastest K-Pop Girl Group
articles.summary: BABYMONSTER achieved 11 million YouTube subscribers in record time, becoming the fastest K-pop girl group to reach this milestone. The achievement reflects the group's explosive growth and dedicated global fanbase.
